specific_mechanism: Haute école movements: piaffe, passage, levade; each movement traverses the null-space of horse's natural motion constraints via systematic training
llm_application: LLM activation-constraint traversal: systematic fine-tuning teaches model to traverse the null-space of pretraining constraints; haute-école-style activation patterns.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes dressage null-space-traversal mapping as proposed.
